discrepancies.description: Q5 vote split 3-2 (decoupled vs batched) is NOT a halt-class consensus failure. All 5 consultants agree on Q1/Q3/Q6 unanimously. discrepancies.resolution: ACCEPTED — verdict-quality independent of SHA verification per all 5 consultants' explicit confidence statements
